overview: A secure, modern online voting platform simulating Ghana presidential elections. Voters register with their Ghana Card ID, cast a single anonymous ballot from a list of candidates, and admins manage the election in real time.
features: Voter registration with Ghana Card ID and password
Secure login with username and password
Candidate list with party name and photo
One vote per voter with confirmation step
Admin dashboard with live vote count updates
Admin controls to start and stop the election
Ghana-themed red, gold, and green design
